texto: Indeed, life is full of tests. You don’t know what they are, so you must treat everything in life with the same care you would bring to a test on which your future rests. I realize that the most important test of all, in my quest, and in every bird’s quest, is the test to be the master of fate.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nancy Yi Fan sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Indeed, life is full of tests. You don’t know what they are, so you must treat everything in life…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, fate, future, útil em momentos de future e vida.

frase_original: Indeed, life is full of tests. You don’t know what they are, so you must treat everything in life with the same care you would bring to a test on which your future rests. I realize that the most important test of all, in my quest, and in every bird’s quest, is the test to be the master of fate.

texto: Wind-voice looked in amazement at the sword in his claws. “I—I’ll keep it safe,” he muttered to Winger. “For the hero, when he comes…”Winger was smiling a light, dreamy smile that radiated all over his thin face. “The hero is here, Wind-voice,” he said, awed. “You’re the hero.
explicacao: Citação de Nancy Yi Fan sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Wind-voice looked in amazement at the sword in his claws. “I—I’ll keep it safe,” he muttered to W…” articula motivacao, heroes, humbleness em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como humbleness e sword.
